title: Managed LLM Platforms — Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure OpenAI

questions.question: Before this lesson, which platform would you reach for first if a customer needed Claude, Llama, and Cohere behind one API?
Which hyperscaler's bet is described as exclusive partnership rather than marketplace?
Roughly what is the measured median TTFT gap between Azure OpenAI (with PTUs) and Bedrock on-demand on Llama 3.1 405B equivalents?
Which Bedrock 2025 feature gives the cleanest per-product cost attribution natively in CloudWatch?
Azure PTUs typically break even versus on-demand at what sustained utilization band?
Why is the lesson's recommended 2026 policy a two-provider minimum for product-critical LLM calls?
options: It is required by SOC 2 Type II
Frontier model leadership rotates monthly, so single-vendor lock-in shuts you out of two-thirds of the frontier
Hyperscalers refuse to sign BAAs unless you also use a competitor
Single-vendor pricing is always more expensive

questions.question: Which statement best describes the FinOps surface across the three platforms?
options: Azure 是最干净的原生方案，Bedrock 不透明
Vertex 完全没有归因接口
三者都暴露了相同的每请求归因
Bedrock 是最干净的原生方案，Vertex 通过 BigQuery 最灵活，Azure 在没有埋点的情况下最不透明
